ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trips" (
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the trip */,
  "start_time_full" TEXT /* Full timestamp of when the trip started */,
  "start_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the trip started */,
  "start_neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the trip started */,
  "start_borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough where the trip started */,
  "start_zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code where the trip started */,
  "end_time_full" TEXT /* Full timestamp of when the trip ended */,
  "end_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where the trip ended */,
  "end_neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the trip ended */,
  "end_borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough where the trip ended */,
  "end_zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code where the trip ended */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the trip started */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the trip started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the trip ended */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time of day when the trip ended */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the trip */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance traveled in the trip */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment for the trip */,
  "ride_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the ride experience */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used in the trip */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bike_status ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_end_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("end_neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trips_start_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("start_zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the station is located */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough where the station is located */,
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the zip code where the station is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the station (number of bikes) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the station */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date the station was maintained */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "bike_availability" INTEGER /* Number of bikes currently available */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides started and ended at the station */,
  "average_usage" REAL /* Average usage of the station (e.g., number of rides per day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_zip_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("zip_code_id") REFERENCES zip_codes ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stations_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the service */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* User's preferred payment method */,
  "ride_preferences" TEXT /* User's preferences for bike types (e.g., standard, electric) */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides taken by the user */,
  "average_ride_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of the user's rides */,
  "frequent_stations" TEXT /* User's most frequently used stations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough where the neighborhood is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides in the neighborhood */,
  "average_ride_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of rides in the neighborhood */,
  "popular_stations" TEXT /* Most popular stations in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_neighborhoods_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the borough */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides in the borough */,
  "average_ride_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of rides in the borough */,
  "popular_stations" TEXT /* Most popular stations in the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zip_codes" (
  "zip_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zip code */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* ID of the borough where the zip code is located */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides in the zip code */,
  "average_ride_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of rides in the zip code */,
  "popular_stations" TEXT /* Most popular stations in the zip code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zip_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zip_codes_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_status" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, in use, maintenance) */,
  "last_known_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last known station where the bike was docked */,
  "last_known_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last known time the bike was docked */,
  "maintenance_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the bike is due for maintenance */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date the bike was maintained */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Next scheduled maintenance date */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides the bike has been used for */,
  "average_ride_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of rides for the bike */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_status_last_known_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_known_station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trip_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the log entry is related to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., start, end, cancel) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used in the trip */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trip_logs_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bike_status ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the log entry is related to */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., maintenance, capacity change) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides affected by the action */,
  "average_ride_duration" TEXT /* Average duration of rides affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_station_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "trip_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trip the feedback is related to (optional) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station the feedback is related to (optional) */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., trip, station) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback or review */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating of the feedback */,
  "response" TEXT /* Company's response to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_trip_id FOREIGN KEY ("trip_id") REFERENCES trips ("trip_id")
)
